title: DTMF
description: Sends DTMF tones on the call. Used to interact with IVR systems on the far end, or to signal systems that respond to DTMF.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

dtmf.description: The DTMF digits to send. Valid characters are 0-9, *, #, and A-D. Use 'w' for a 500ms pause between digits.

duration.description: Duration in milliseconds for each DTMF tone.
